metadata.title: Metal Fabrication | AdonERP
metadata.description: AI-powered metal fabrication platform for all your manufacturing operations — from CRM and quote calculator to procurement automation, inventory, and project management.

hero.title: Metal Fabrication
hero.description: Manage customer relationships, create accurate quotes, and handle everything from simple sales orders to complex projects.
hero.testimonialQuote: I am the first to admit, after all of that cussing and badmouthing because we were just a mess at the beginning, now that it's functioning, it is a fantastic program.

quotesSection.title: Craft custom
quotesSection.description: Generate quotations and define the most accurate price for clients with a built-in quote calculator.

replenishmentSection.title: Timely delivery
replenishmentSection.description: Get a complete overview of production processes and manage everything from cost estimation to final delivery.

purchaseSection.title: Track your
purchaseSection.description: Manage, group, compare and validate your purchases while automating the creation process.

projectSection.title: Effortless project
projectSection.subtitle: management
projectSection.description: Customize your project overview, track only the essential information, and keep the right details visible without overload.

featuresSection.title: All the features
featuresSection.subtitle: done right.
featuresSection.description: Complete tools for fabrication quotes, production, purchasing, traceability, invoicing and project management.

list.title: CRM pipeline
list.description: Track leads, quotes, and projects through every sales stage.

list.title: Clear traceability
list.description: Follow materials from raw stock to finished fabricated parts.

list.title: Quote Calculator
list.description: Calculate accurate quotes based on materials, labor, and complexity.

list.title: Automate procurement
list.description: Auto-create purchase orders when raw materials run low.

list.title: Project top bar
list.description: Visualize project progress, deadlines, and key metrics at a glance.

list.title: Flexible invoicing
list.description: Invoice based on milestones, partial deliveries, or custom terms.

appsSection.title: One need, one app.
appsSection.description: Expand as you grow with connected apps for your metal fabrication operation, CRM, production, and inventory.

testimonials.name: Mike Thompson
testimonials.content: I am the first to admit, after all of that cussing and badmouthing because we were just a mess at the beginning, now that it's functioning, it is a fantastic program.

testimonials.name: Elena Vasquez
testimonials.content: AdonERP transformed our metal fabrication business. The quote calculator alone saved us hours, and the procurement automation keeps our shop running smoothly.

ctaBanner.title: Join 15 million happy users
ctaBanner.description: who grow their business with AdonERP — the complete solution for metal fabrication shops and manufacturers.

footerCta.eyebrowLabel: Ready to scale your fabrication shop
footerCta.title: Unleash
footerCta.subtitle: your growth potential
footerCta.description: Launch a metal fabrication workflow that helps you create accurate quotes, manage production, and deliver quality products on time.
